title: DeHub in the Press: Featured Across Global Publications
html:
It's been a landmark run for DeHub in the media. As we've built out our streaming, gaming and marketplace d'apps through the bear market, some of the world's biggest and most trusted publications have taken notice, putting a spotlight on our mission to democratise media and hand ownership back to creators and their communities.

We wanted to gather these features in one place so the community can read them, share them, and see for themselves that our little crypto project is rubbing shoulders with names read by hundreds of millions of people every month. Here are the articles.

US Weekly

A celebrity and entertainment magazine with a readership of over 50 million people, US Weekly featured DeHub among the companies driving what it called the "blue ocean frontier" of blockchain. It's a long way from the usual crypto press, and exactly the kind of mainstream, off-chain audience we're built to reach.

Read it: Meet the Companies Driving the Blue Ocean Frontier of Blockchain — US Weekly

Yahoo Finance

With a readership that spans all four corners of the globe, Yahoo Finance is the world's largest business news platform, a natural home for a piece introducing our plans to build a portal to the metaverse and reshape entertainment.

Read it: DeHub Launching Portal to the Metaverse — Yahoo Finance

Entrepreneur

One of the most recognised names in business media, Entrepreneur reaches more than 20 million unique users each month and over 15 million followers across social. Our founders Malik, Mike and Indi sat down for an interview and review of DeHub's "redefining vision" for the creator economy.

Read it: DeHub's "Redefining Vision" — Entrepreneur

Investing.com

Reaching 46 million users each month, Investing.com is one of the most visited financial platforms in the world. DeHub appeared in its crypto coverage as a project of interest in the metaverse goldrush, set to disrupt the entertainment and lifestyle industries.

Read it: DeHub's Portal to the Metaverse Set to Disrupt Entertainment & Lifestyle — Investing.com

Why this matters

Press coverage in publications like these isn't something you can simply buy your way into on the terms we did, they cover projects with substance, traction and a clear vision. Every one of these features introduces DeHub to a huge, mainstream audience that most crypto projects never reach, building the kind of off-chain credibility that compounds over years.

We're proud of what the team and community have achieved to earn this attention, and this is only the beginning. You can find the full, always-updated list of our press features on the Featured In page in our docs.

Bring on the next headline.
